name: PT Wijaya Karya Bangunan Gedung Tbk.
summary: PT Wijaya Karya Bangunan Gedung Tbk provides building construction services in Indonesia. The company offers general civil construction services, such as foundation and structural work, mechanical work, electrical, plumbing, lighting, and architecture, as well as interior and exterior work, including landscape and hardscape work. It also provides precast blocks, precast columns, hollow core slab, and precast concrete fa√É¬ßade. The company constructs academic facilities, airports, apartments, commercial facilities, hospitals, hotels, offices, and sports facilities. It serves governments and private sectors. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Wijaya Karya Bangunan Gedung Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Wijaya Karya (Persero) Tbk.
